data.title: test-skill-trace-analyze.sh: H10 refuted case exits 2 instead of 0
data.description: CI Script Tests failure. test_h10_refuted_some_invokes_resumed expects exit 0 and H10=refuted but gets exit 2 and empty H10 value. The skill-trace-analyze.sh script does not handle the partial CONTROL_LOSS case correctly.
